title: Performance Management in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger performance management in practice judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Performance Management in Practice is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Performance Management in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good performance management in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Performance Management in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
